allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); total=len\(d\); matched=sum\(1 for v in d.values\(\) if v[''''JP''''] or v[''''CN'''']\); jp=sum\(len\(v[''''JP'''']\) for v in d.values\(\)\); cn=sum\(len\(v[''''CN'''']\) for v in d.values\(\)\); print\(f''''Total foods: {total}, With matches: {matched}, Empty: {total-matched}, JP dupes: {jp}, CN dupes: {cn}, Total dupes: {jp+cn}''''\)")
